title: BetterTime
description: Make the Minecraft's time system better.
body:
**BetterTime** is a powerful Minecraft Forge mod designed for players who want precise control and display of in-game time. Key features include:

- **Accurate Time Query and Setting**: Use simple commands to query or set the game time, easily managing day and night cycles.
- **Immersive Calendar Experience**: Displays a day title with sound effects at the start of each new day.
- **Customizable HUD Time Display**: Shows the game time in real-time, with customizable position and color via configuration files.
- **Replacement of Vanilla Time Commands**: Replaces vanilla time commands, making time management more intuitive and convenient.
- **Custom Configuration**: Offers several configuration options.
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gpsF805q/images/2a4528547cc7d0b04b19452da503fc97e6a664a7.png)
